---
name: Agent Task
about: A task designed to be solved by AI agents
title: '[Agent Task] '
labels: agent-task, good-first-issue
assignees: ''
---

**Task Description**
Clear description of what needs to be built or fixed.

**Context**
Why this matters and how it fits into the system.

**Relevant Files**
- `src/file.js` -- what to look at
- `src/other.js` -- related code

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Existing MCP tools still work
- [ ] No breaking changes to tool interfaces

**How to Start**
Tell your AI agent:
> "Read llms.txt and EXTENDING.md in the knowledge-base-server repo, then implement issue #N."

**Difficulty**
- [ ] Easy (< 1 hour with AI)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 hours with AI)
- [ ] Hard (requires architecture understanding)
